creator: logans@cottsay.net
text:
Created attachment 252095
Port tree patch for OpenELP

Description:
OpenELP is an open source EchoLink proxy for Linux and Windows. It aims to be
efficient and maintain a small footprint, while still implementing all of the
features present in the official EchoLink proxy.

Project URL:
https://github.com/cottsay/openelp

More information on EchoLink and the role of the EchoLink proxy:
https://www.echolink.org/proxy.htm
